title: Make beszel_agent role OS-agnostic (Alpine + Ubuntu)
description: The beszel_agent role currently uses apk and OpenRC (Alpine-only). Add conditional logic to support apt and systemd for Ubuntu hosts. Needed for Ollama and OpenClaw LXC monitoring.

title: OpenClaw on Proxmox
description: Deploy OpenClaw AI assistant and Ollama inference server as separate LXC containers on Proxmox (nuc13). Two-stage IaC: OpenTofu for container creation + Ansible for provisioning. Ollama LXC (VMID 201): 4 cores, 12GB RAM, 30GB disk, serves llama3.1 8B. OpenClaw LXC (VMID 202): 2 cores, 4GB RAM, 20GB disk, connects to Ollama. Both Tailscale-only.

title: Scaffold OpenTofu stack for OpenClaw LXC
description: Create tofu/proxmox/openclaw/ with main.tf, provider.tf, backend.tf, variables.tf, .env.template. Ubuntu 22.04 template, unprivileged container, 2 cores, 4GB RAM, 20GB disk. SSH bootstrap (no TUN needed). Reuse provider pattern from tailscale-exit-nordvpn-nl.

title: Create Ansible role for OpenClaw provisioning
description: Create ansible/roles/openclaw/ with tasks, defaults, handlers, templates. Install Node.js 22, install OpenClaw via npm (not curl|bash), create systemd service, configure environment to point OLLAMA_HOST to the Ollama LXC's Tailscale IP on port 11434. Add host entry to inventory.yml.

title: Create Ansible playbook for OpenClaw
description: Create ansible/playbooks/openclaw.yml. Include openclaw role and beszel_agent role for monitoring. Handle pre-tasks (Python install, facts gathering) for Ubuntu.

title: Configure secrets for OpenClaw stack
description: Add .env.template and .env.sops.enc for the tofu stack. Add OpenClaw-specific secrets to ansible/secrets.yml.template (AI provider API key, any messaging integration tokens). Update Makefile with tofu-decrypt/encrypt targets for the new stack.

title: Test and validate OpenClaw deployment
description: Deploy both LXCs (Ollama VMID 201, OpenClaw VMID 202) via tofu apply. Provision both via Ansible. Verify Ollama serves a model (curl ollama:11434/api/generate). Verify OpenClaw connects to Ollama and responds. Verify Tailscale-only access to both dashboards. Document any manual steps (e.g. Tailscale approval, model pull).

title: Scaffold OpenTofu stack for Ollama LXC
description: Create tofu/proxmox/ollama/ with main.tf, provider.tf, backend.tf, variables.tf, .env.template. Ubuntu 22.04 template, unprivileged container, 4 cores, 12GB RAM, 30GB disk. SSH bootstrap. VMID 201.

title: Create Ansible role for Ollama provisioning
description: Create ansible/roles/ollama/ with tasks, defaults, handlers, templates. Install Ollama, configure systemd service, pull default model (llama3.1:8b-q4_K_M), expose API on port 11434. Add host entry to inventory.yml.

title: Create Ansible playbook for Ollama
description: Create ansible/playbooks/ollama.yml. Include ollama role and beszel_agent role for monitoring. Handle pre-tasks (Python install, facts gathering) for Ubuntu.

title: Add Open WebUI to dockerhost compose stack
description: Add Open WebUI service to docker/dockerhost/docker-compose.yml. Point OLLAMA_BASE_URL to Ollama LXC's Tailscale IP (port 11434). Expose via Traefik or direct port. Persistent volume for chat history and user settings.
